Component.Name: PickListIdEdit
Component.Caption: C(PickListStatic)
Component.ComboListSource: STDOLE SL.SLPickLists( PROPERTIES(PickListId, DerStatusFormatted, CustNum, CustSeq) DISPLAY(1,2,3,4)ORDERBY(PickListId DESC))

Component.Name: PickListIdGridCol
Component.ComboListSource: STDOLE SL.SLPickLists( PROPERTIES(PickListId, DerStatusFormatted, CustNum, CustSeq) DISPLAY(1,2,3,4)ORDERBY(PickListId DESC))

EventHandler.Name: CheckDelPick
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLPickLists.CheckDelPickSp( PARMS(VAR P(SLPickListRefs.PickListId), VAR P(SLPickListRefs.Sequence), RVAR V(CheckDelPickError), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: StdObjectSave
EventHandler.Response: DefineVariables.DefineVariableSp( PARMS(VAR CallByPickMaintenance, VAR 1, MESSAGE) COLID(object) )

EventHandler.Name: StdObjectSelectCurrentCompleted
EventHandler.Response: SLFormExtMsgEntities.FormatJSONVar( PARMS(VAR PickMaintenance, VAR V(JSONVarNotInterpret), RVAR V(JSONVarWithLIT)) COLID(object) )

Variable.Name: cds_DataSourcePickListLocGrid
Variable.Value: object.SLPickListLocs( CA(VR) OBJNAME(oLocations) FILTERPERM(Sequence=FV(TempSequence)) ORDERBY(Loc, Lot) )

Variable.Name: cds_DataSourcePickListSerialGrid
Variable.Value: object.SLPickListSerials( CA(IV) OBJNAME(oSerialNumber) FILTERPERM(Sequence=FV(TempSequence) and Loc = FV(TempLoc) and Lot=FV(TempLot)) ORDERBY(SerNum) )

Variable.Name: cvw_FeatureControlEdit
Variable.Value: Visible:#C(ScsCustSerNumGridCol), #GV(IsCSIB_68758ActiveVar) = "1", "True", Visible:#C(LocCustLotGridCol), #GV(IsCSIB_71568ActiveVar) = 1, "True", Visible:#C(RouteIdStatic), #GV(IsCSIB_61605ActiveVar) = "1", "True", Visible:#C(RouteIdEdit), #GV(IsCSIB_61605ActiveVar) = "1", "True", Visible:#C(RefTypegridCol), #GV(IsCSIB_61605ActiveVar) = "1", "True", Visible:#C(RefSeqgridCol), #GV(IsCSIB_61605ActiveVar) = "1", "True", Visible:#C(RefWCgridCol), #GV(IsCSIB_61605ActiveVar) = "1", "True", Visible:#C
